title: Commission.skills with an unresolvable filesystem source stops with error_occurred + agent_stopped(reason=error) before any turn runs
description: SPEC.md §8.7.3 — skill resolution is part of the prelude. If a Commission.skills[].avp.source can't be read (file missing, IO error, malformed SKILL.md), the agent MUST emit avp.error_occurred and stop with reason=error before turn 1. Pins fail-fast behavior so a Commission with stale skill paths never silently runs without the skill bodies its author intended.

forbidden_events.label: no model turn runs when a declared skill can't be resolved
skill_loaded must NOT fire for a skill whose body never reached context
